---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature request
---

**Describe your idea**
A clear description of the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

**Problem it solves**
What problem does this feature address? Why would it be useful?

**Possible solution**
If you have an idea for how it could work, describe it here.

**Additional context**
Any other information, screenshots, or examples that might help.
